End time for outage (UTC; represented using the RFC-3339 standard, exclusive)

Filter by application name

Get objects in the Security Cloud Control tenant. To use the object APIs, contact customer support or provision Multicloud Defense and turn on object sharing. Note: the object APIs only support operations on network objects and groups.
The query to execute. Use the Lucene Query Syntax to construct your query. Possible fields to search by are name, content.
If enabled, the search will also include results from override objects.

The offset of the results retrieved. The Security Cloud Control API uses the offset field to determine the index of the first result retrieved, and will retrieve `limit` results from the offset specified.
The number of results to retrieve.
